overall.description: A continuous drive through Night City in Cyberpunk 2077, beginning in a colorful commercial district with rainbow banners during golden hour, transitioning through urban canyons at dusk with massive holographic advertisements, entering a covered tunnel with blue neon lighting, and emerging into the neon-lit city center at night. The footage showcases the game's detailed cyberpunk aesthetic with dynamic lighting and dense urban architecture.

events.description: vehicle ahead changes lanes to the right

agents.ego_description: driving forward through a vibrant commercial district with rainbow banners overhead, following traffic flow

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: colorful striped fabric decorations suspended across the street between buildings
pedestrian bridge with glass sides crossing above the street
tall modern skyscraper with glass facade visible in the distance
vertical illuminated signage on commercial buildings

segments.scene_description: Driving through a sunlit commercial district adorned with vibrant rainbow fabric banners strung across the street. An elevated pedestrian walkway crosses overhead while neon signs decorate the modern buildings. The camera follows a red sedan through moderate traffic under clear skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial underpass area with concrete walls

events.description: vehicle turns right at intersection, passing under an overpass
enters shadow of industrial structure, lighting becomes significantly darker

agents.ego_description: navigating a right turn at an intersection and proceeding under a concrete overpass into a darker industrial area

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with thick support pillars
concrete retaining wall covered in colorful graffiti tags
utilitarian structure with steam vents and metal piping

segments.scene_description: The vehicle executes a right turn and drives beneath a massive concrete overpass, transitioning from the colorful commercial district into a grittier industrial zone. Graffiti-covered walls line the left side while steam vents rise from industrial buildings on the right, with lighting dimming significantly under the overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon with neon-lit commercial buildings

events.description: emerges from underpass into dense urban canyon with towering buildings
sun sets further, neon signs become more prominent against darkening sky

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the urban canyon, navigating between tall corporate buildings with increasing neon illumination

notable_agents.action: black sedan merging into the lane from the right

entered.detail: large red holographic koi fish swimming animation projected on building facade
multi-level highway structure crossing above the street
reflective glass tower with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the industrial underpass into a dense urban canyon flanked by towering glass skyscrapers. The sky darkens to dusk as massive holographic advertisements—including a prominent red fish—illuminate the buildings. The vehicle navigates moderate traffic while passing under elevated highway structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: city center with giant holographic advertisements

events.description: giant holographic fish advertisements become visible on both sides of the street
transition to blue hour, natural light fades completely, neon and holograms dominate

agents.ego_description: cruising through the dense city center surrounded by massive holographic advertisements and heavy vehicle traffic

entered.detail: massive red holographic koi fish animation covering entire building face
massive blue holographic koi fish animation swimming across building facade
elevated roadway with support columns spanning the width of the street

segments.scene_description: Driving through the heart of the city center at blue hour, flanked by enormous holographic fish advertisements—one red and one blue—swimming across the facades of towering buildings. The natural light has faded completely, replaced by the glow of neon signs and holograms, while dense traffic fills the multi-lane road beneath overhead highway structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway tunnel with geometric glass ceiling

events.description: enters covered tunnel with distinctive geometric glass and steel ceiling structure
blue neon strip lights illuminate the tunnel interior, creating futuristic ambiance

agents.ego_description: maintaining speed through the covered tunnel section, following the flow of traffic under blue neon lighting

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving ahead with brake lights illuminated

entered.detail: enclosed highway passage with geometric triangular glass ceiling panels
triangular glass and steel lattice roof structure with blue lighting
horizontal blue LED strips running along the tunnel walls

segments.scene_description: Entering a futuristic covered highway tunnel characterized by a striking geometric glass ceiling with triangular panels. The environment shifts to enclosed artificial lighting with blue neon strips lining the walls, creating a cyberpunk atmosphere as the vehicle follows traffic through the tunnel.

scene_state.functional_zone: night city center with massive corporate advertisements

events.description: exits tunnel into open night city with massive illuminated billboards
massive Kiroshi Optics holographic advertisement becomes visible on right side

agents.ego_description: exiting the tunnel into the fully darkened city center, navigating toward the massive Kiroshi advertisement

entered.detail: massive holographic advertisement for Kiroshi Optics showing a helmeted figure
dense cluster of illuminated skyscrapers against the night sky
building covered in bright neon signage and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel into the fully night-time city center, where the massive Kiroshi Optics holographic advertisement dominates the right side of the street. The surrounding buildings are covered in dense neon signage and illuminated facades, creating a vibrant cyberpunk cityscape as the vehicle continues through the urban canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive that transitions from a vibrant, sunlit commercial district into a gritty industrial zone and finally into a towering urban canyon at dusk. It begins by following a red sedan through a bright street adorned with rainbow fabric banners and neon signs under a clear sky. As the vehicle executes a right turn, the scene shifts abruptly beneath a massive concrete overpass, where the lighting dims and the environment becomes industrial with graffiti-covered walls and rising steam vents. The camera then emerges from the shadows into a dense corridor of glass skyscrapers as the sky darkens to dusk. Finally, the view expands to reveal massive holographic advertisements, including a prominent red fish, illuminating the city as the car navigates traffic beneath elevated highway structures.

The shot follows a continuous drive through a dense urban canyon that transitions from the fading light of blue hour into a fully neon-lit nocturnal cityscape. It begins amidst heavy traffic flanked by towering buildings, where enormous red and blue holographic fish swim across the facades as the natural light vanishes. The scene then shifts as the vehicle enters a futuristic covered highway tunnel, replacing the open sky with a geometric glass ceiling and walls lined with glowing blue neon strips. As the camera emerges from the tunnel, the environment opens back up into the heart of the city at night, where the massive Kiroshi Optics hologram dominates the skyline. The journey concludes by gliding through a vibrant urban corridor saturated with dense neon signage and illuminated architectural facades.
